query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT s.gestanteId) as totalComAcesso,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN s.ativo = 1 THEN s.gestanteId END) as totalAtivas
FROM sessoesGestante s;
